#!/bin/bash

# Verifier script for llms.txt file

# Check if llms.txt file exists
if [ ! -f "llms.txt" ]; then
  echo "Error: llms.txt file not found"
  exit 1
fi

# Check if llms.txt file is empty
if [ ! -s "llms.txt" ]; then
  echo "Error: llms.txt file is empty"
  exit 1
fi

# Check if llms.txt file contains required sections
if ! grep -q "## Project Overview" "llms.txt"; then
  echo "Error: llms.txt file is missing Project Overview section"
  exit 1
fi

if ! grep -q "## Usage Guidelines" "llms.txt"; then
  echo "Error: llms.txt file is missing Usage Guidelines section"
  exit 1
fi

if ! grep -q "## Contact Information" "llms.txt"; then
  echo "Error: llms.txt file is missing Contact Information section"
  exit 1
fi

# Check if llms.txt file contains at least one LLM
if ! grep -q "Model Name:" "llms.txt"; then
  echo "Error: llms.txt file does not contain any LLMs"
  exit 1
fi

echo "llms.txt file is valid"
exit 0
